title: An Efficient LiDAR-Camera Fusion Network for Multi-Class 3D Dynamic Object Detection and Trajectory Prediction
abstract: Proposes a LiDAR-camera fusion network for multi-class 3D dynamic object detection combined with trajectory prediction. Evaluated on the CODa benchmark and nuScenes, and deployed in real time (13.9 FPS) on a wheelchair robot with an entry-level RTX 3060 GPU, showing strong generalizability for practical deployment.

title: LV-DOT: LiDAR-Visual Dynamic Obstacle Detection and Tracking for Autonomous Robot Navigation
abstract: Presents a lightweight LiDAR-visual fusion framework for dynamic obstacle detection and tracking on autonomous mobile robots, combining LiDAR's wide-range depth accuracy with camera's rich visual features to improve identification of moving obstacles for navigation.

title: Reliability-Driven LiDAR-Camera Fusion for Robust 3D Object Detection
abstract: Introduces ReliFusion, a fusion approach aimed at maintaining robust 3D detection performance under sensor malfunction scenarios such as LiDAR occlusion or camera failure, evaluated with controlled corruption experiments.

title: MDF: Multi-Modal Data Fusion with CNN-Based Object Detection for Enhanced Indoor Localization Using LiDAR-SLAM
abstract: Combines CNN-based object detection with LiDAR-SLAM for indoor localization accuracy improvement, focusing on static-map-oriented localization rather than dynamic obstacle avoidance.
